# InMemoryTaskStore constructor

Creates a store, optionally with an injected clock.

```csharp
public InMemoryTaskStore(Func<DateTimeOffset>? now = null)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| now | A clock used for created/updated timestamps AND ttl expiry; defaults to UtcNow. Inject a controllable clock to drive expiry deterministically in tests. |
